name: webappinst
description: Move tab to standalone window, without tabs bar, navigation bar and bookmark bar UI.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/webappinst.xpi dist/webappinst.zip && cd extension && zip -r9DX ../dist/webappinst.xpi * -x "*.DS_Store" && cd .. && cp dist/webappinst.xpi dist/webappinst.zip
